nasb.text: Now the son of an Israelite woman, whose father was an Egyptian, went out among the sons of Israel; and the Israelite woman’s son and a man of Israel struggled with each other in the camp.

esv.text: Now an Israelite woman’s son, whose father was an Egyptian, went out among the people of Israel. And the Israelite woman’s son and a man of Israel fought in the camp,

cnv.text: 有一個以色列婦人的兒子，父親是埃及人，在以色列人中間出入；這以色列婦人的兒子在營裡和一個以色列人爭吵；

ccb.text: 有一个人，母亲是以色列人，父亲是埃及人，在营中与一个以色列人打起架来。
